message:
fix(components): add button type attributes across visualization components

Extend the accessibility fix for button type attributes across all
visualization and showcase components:

Components Updated:
- bakery-visualizations.tsx
- barra-visualizations.tsx
- cmaes-article.tsx
- demo-showcase.tsx
- endorsement-showcase.tsx
- flywheel-visualization.tsx
- hoeffding-visualizations.tsx
- tldr-tool-card.tsx

Each file receives explicit type="button" on interactive buttons to
prevent implicit form submission behavior and improve accessibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
